name: Leek-And-Artichoke Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large Leek, white part only; washed and sliced
1 small New potato, quartered and thinly sliced
6 Leaves butter lettuce, sliced into 1/4 inch strips
-=OR=- a handful of Sorrel leaves, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the artichokes by removing tough outer leaves and slicing off the top 2/3 of inner leaves. Trim the outsides, cut into quarters, remove chokes, and dice trimmed hearts.
2. Add diced hearts to acidulated water as you work.
3. Warm olive oil in a pot, add leeks, drained artichoke quarters, whole garlic cloves, potato slices, lettuce or sorrel, parsley, and mint.
4. Season with salt, add 1/2 cup water, and gently stew until vegetables are wilted (about 5 minutes).
5. Add peas and remaining water; bring to a boil.
6. Lower heat and simmer partially covered for 20 minutes or until artichokes are cooked.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning.
8. Serve hot with freshly ground pepper, optional chervil or parsley, olive oil drizzled into each serving, and grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese.
